hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,shutil,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); src=ti.get('source',''); tgt=ti.get('target',''); os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(tgt or '.'), exist_ok=True); shutil.copytree(src,tgt,symlinks=True,dirs_exist_ok=True); print(f'OK copied to {tgt}')"
python3 -c "import sys,json,shutil; d=json.load(sys.stdin); ti=d.get('tool_input',{}); wt=ti.get('worktree',''); shutil.rmtree(wt,ignore_errors=True); print(f'OK removed {wt}')"
